purpose: Prove IAMScope emits validated admin reachability and cross-account trust findings for one controlled two-account AssumeRole path.
claim_surface: IAMScope can collect the caller-side sts:AssumeRole permission edge from Env22 Alice to the target account admin role.
IAMScope can collect the target-side trust edge from Env22 Alice to the target account admin role.
IAMScope can mark the trust edge as cross-account.
IAMScope can emit validated admin_reachability for this cross-account target path without blockers.
IAMScope can emit validated cross_account_trust for this target path.
benchmark_proves: For the Env22 alice->cross-account-admin path, scenario.json contains the expected sts:AssumeRole permission edge.
For the Env22 alice->cross-account-admin path, scenario.json contains the expected sts:AssumeRole trust edge.
For that path, IAMScope emitted at least one validated admin_reachability finding.
For that path, IAMScope emitted zero blocked admin_reachability findings.
For that path, IAMScope emitted zero inconclusive admin_reachability findings.
For that path, IAMScope emitted at least one validated cross_account_trust finding.
For that path, validated target findings have no blockers.
benchmark_does_not_prove: It does not prove every cross-account trust or principal matching shape.
It does not prove cross-account runtime exploitability.
It does not prove cross-account SCP, permission-boundary, or condition handling.
It does not prove production readiness.
unknowns_remaining: Env23 and later mutations should test principal-scoped-away and conditioned cross-account trust paths.
Longer cross-account chains remain outside this case.
Resource-policy Allow and generic resource-policy Deny remain outside this case.

environment.notes: Two-account IAM-only positive cross-account AssumeRole path. No SCPs or Organizations mutations are created.

ground_truth.reason: Env22 Alice has sts:AssumeRole permission on env22-cross-account-admin, the target role trusts Alice exactly, and the role has AdministratorAccess.

directly_proven_if_pass: The exact Env22 cross-account permission edge exists structurally.
The exact Env22 cross-account trust edge exists structurally.
The exact Env22 alice->cross-account-admin path is emitted as validated admin_reachability.
The exact Env22 alice->cross-account-admin path is emitted as validated cross_account_trust.
The exact Env22 alice->cross-account-admin path is not emitted as blocked or inconclusive.
strongly_supported_if_pass: IAMScope's same-organization cross-account trust reasoning is coherent on one controlled live AWS positive path.
only_implied_even_if_pass: Broader cross-account trust correctness remains only implied.
